docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ARMAS, PANFILO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PARKER, JORDAN $4,450.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,500.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
